creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Superseded by bug 204773

@Euan, in future, we prefer to make adjustments (within the spirit of the original report) of existing issues, rather than split them out into new issues unnecessarily.

This issue wasn't reported by you but as you are the current MAINTAINER, your instructions (if you cant make the changes to yourself) for what you'd like updated/changes is sufficient to make progress.

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 204773 ***
